description_long: This hammer features a strikingly modern design with a long, metallic handle that appears reinforced and slightly textured for grip. The head is double-sided, each side forming a large, polygonal striking face with a crystalline, blue-tinted core encased in a black, angular frame. The central section of the head is metallic and gold-toned, connecting the two faces and providing structural integrity. The blue crystalline sections have a swirling, almost energy-like appearance, suggesting a decorative or possibly functional enhancement. The handle transitions from a dark blue near the head to a lighter metallic silver towards the grip, which is capped with a dark, rubberized end. The overall construction suggests a tool designed for heavy-duty impact, possibly for specialized urban or industrial tasks.
description: A modern hammer with a long metallic handle and a double-sided, polygonal head featuring blue crystalline faces and gold-toned accents. The design is robust and visually striking, with a textured grip and decorative energy-like elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both polygonal blue crystalline striking faces and the gold-toned central connector, with the full length of the handle visible.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the thickness and depth of the hammer's head, with the blue crystalline faces partially visible.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the polygonal head and the length of the handle, with the blue crystalline sections less prominent.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the profile of one polygonal striking face and the straight, metallic handle extending away.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metallic handle with a dark blue-to-silver gradient, featuring a rubberized, textured grip at the end for enhanced handling.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, polygonal sledge-type head with large blue crystalline striking faces encased in a black frame and connected by a gold-toned metallic core.
